market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Bitcoin miners' AI pivot faces $50 billion reality check, says VanEck
articles.description: VanEck says investors are shifting focus from contract announcements to execution risk as miners chase AI revenue.

articles.title: Tokenized asset market tops $43B as institutions accelerate blockchain adoption
articles.description: Tokenized financial assets have surged 37% in six months as institutions expand blockchain adoption and the market broadens beyond funds and private credit, according to Token Terminal.

articles.title: U.S. senators urge Treasury not to leave states out of GENIUS Act stablecoin process
articles.description: Senators led by Republican Cynthia Lummis are insisting the Treasury Department ensure states get a process to prove their ability to supervise stablecoins.

articles.title: Hyperliquid, Uniswap and Worldcoin buck crypto slump as traders chase AI, DeFi trends
articles.description: A handful of tokens continued their run while bitcoin and the rest of the crypto market stalled after the early week bounce.

articles.title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
articles.description: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

articles.title: Bitcoin metric near ‘low-risk’ zone after holders absorb 125K BTC in June: Time for a rebound?
articles.description: Bitcoin’s Sharpe ratio and a 125,000 BTC increase in BTC accumulator demand mark the start of a new demand phase. Will prices follow?

articles.title: Crypto PAC has $12M stake in Senate primary runoff as Alabama voters head to polls
articles.description: Defend American Jobs reported spending $7.4 million on media to support Republican Barry Moore ahead of his May 20 Alabama primary, and an additional $4.7 million before Tuesday’s runoffs.

articles.title: Coinbase lets users transfer stock portfolios as exchange expands beyond crypto
articles.description: The crypto exchange is deepening its push into traditional finance by enabling ACATS stock transfers and expanding trading products beyond digital assets.

articles.title: Coinbase intoduces AI advisor, stock options, and pre-IPO markets in finance push
articles.description: The crypto exchange is expanding into investing, derivatives and banking services as it pursues an all-in-one financial platform.

articles.title: XRP whale wallet withdrawals top 720M as risk-adjusted return data points to opportunity
articles.description: Whales pulled more than 720 million XRP from exchanges, as various data points converge to predict a potential 50% rally.

articles.title: Qualcomm wants to be the chip inside whatever replaces your smartphone, and it just announced two products toward that end
articles.description: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said Tuesday that the company is working on over 40 different AI wearable devices — including jewelry, earbuds with cameras, pins, and watches — a sign of how aggressively the chipmaker is betting that the next major computing platform won't be a phone.

articles.title: Bug in FIFA World Cup internal system gave anyone ability to modify TV stream
articles.description: A security researcher said a flaw in FIFA’s online platforms allowed her to access several internal systems, including one that could have allowed her to take control of the TV stream of every World Cup match.

articles.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
articles.description: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.

articles.title: Rivian cuts hundreds of workers after R2 deliveries start
articles.description: The company said the cuts were part of a restructuring meant to help scale to profitability. Rivian recently pushed back its profitability goal to invest in autonomy.

articles.title: State Street launches GENIUS Act-aligned money market fund for stablecoin reserves
articles.description: The launch comes amid growing competition among financial institutions to manage assets backing dollar-pegged stablecoins.

articles.title: Ripple targets Africa’s booming remittance market with Flutterwave investment
articles.description: Ripple’s investment in Flutterwave will bring RLUSD, Ripple Payments and XRPL to one of Africa’s largest fintechs as blockchain remittances gain traction.

articles.title: Why US-regulated Bitcoin perpetuals could change crypto trading
articles.description: US-regulated Bitcoin perpetual futures could give retail and institutional traders new ways to access crypto derivatives.

articles.title: Snap finally debuts its long-awaited AR glasses, Specs, and, oof, they aren’t cheap
articles.description: For over a decade now, Snap has been working on this device. Now the glasses are finally here. So what stands out on first impression?

articles.title: Sixty percent of US consumers say ‘AI’ in brand messaging is a turnoff, survey finds
articles.description: WordPress VIP’s latest survey suggests consumers are wary of AI-generated answers even as companies increasingly view AI search as an important referral channel.

articles.title: Binance says it considers EU license compliant amid reports of potential rejection
articles.description: Without specifically calling out a report on Binance’s EU license, the crypto exchange warned that any rejection forcing it to delay activities in the region could “weaken liquidity” and present other potential risks.
